variants.voiceover_text: Painting or sanding? Skip hours of cleanup. Pre-taped masking film combines yellow tape and clear PE film in one roll. First press the yellow tape firmly along the cabinet edge. Then pull the film down to cover the tile and countertop. Fix the far edge, pull tight, and tear by hand. Paint and dust stay on the film. Peel it away with the mess and leave far less cleanup behind.

variants.voiceover_text: One roll does two jobs. The yellow masking tape and clear PE film are permanently connected, so the product stays together while you work. Press the yellow tape along the cabinet edge first. Then pull the film down, cover the surface, fix the far edge, and tear by hand. Paint and dust land on the film, and the dirty covering peels away when the job is done.
